bdlnm

The goal of bdlnm is to provide a collection of functions for distributed lag non-linear bayesian models.

Installation

You can install the development version of bdlnm like so:

pak::pkg_install("pasahe/bdlnm")

Because this is a private repository, you have to get installation permissions.
